title: Profile

suggested.title: Suggested next opponent
suggested.matched: Matched to your Glicko-2 bots rating ({{rating}}).

linkCopied: Profile link copied to the clipboard

share.title: Share your profile
share.signedOut: Sign in (top right) to publish a shareable profile card and join the leaderboards. Sharing is opt-in, per stat.
share.intro: Everything is private by default. Flip on what you want the world to see — only your display name plus the sections below are ever shown, nothing else.

profileToggle.label: Public profile page
profileToggle.desc: Anyone with your link can view the shared sections

leaderboardsToggle.label: Leaderboards
leaderboardsToggle.desc: Rank your ratings + Puzzle Rush best on the public boards

share.previewTitle: See your profile as others do

error.title: Couldn't load this profile
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the server — check your connection and try again.

missing.title: This profile is private or doesn't exist
missing.body: Players choose exactly what they share on Chesser. If this is your link, enable sharing on your Profile tab.

public.nothingShared: {{username}} keeps their stats to themselves. Respect.
public.footer: Shared by {{username}} on Chesser — only opted-in stats are shown.

report.title: Report {{username}}
report.done: Thanks — your report was recorded and will be reviewed.
report.signedOut: Sign in (top right) to report a profile — reports need an account.
report.error: Could not send the report — try again.

card.noStats: A Chesser player with more secrets than shared stats.
card.invite: Play & train at your own pace — puzzles, bots, openings.
card.renderError: Could not render the card image.
